hero.headline: From first call to final delivery - and everything in between.
hero.sub: A transparent, repeatable process built for agency owners who need reliable execution without the coordination overhead. No guessing, no chasing, no surprises.

journey.headline: What happens, and when.
journey.sub: Every engagement follows the same four-phase rhythm. Whether it's a one-off project or an ongoing retainer, you always know exactly where things stand.

phases.label: Booking
phases.title: Book a discovery call
phases.description: The process starts with a single 30-minute call. No lengthy questionnaires, no sales decks, no pressure.

steps.title: Book online in 60 seconds
steps.body: Pick a time that suits you from our calendar. You'll get a confirmation with a brief pre-call form - three questions, two minutes.

steps.title: 30-minute discovery call
steps.body: We scope the brief, understand your client's goals, and confirm whether we're the right fit. If we're not, we'll tell you on the call.

steps.title: Proposal in your inbox within 24 hours
steps.body: Custom scope, fixed timeline, and a locked price. No hourly rates, no change order surprises. You approve or push back - we iterate until it's right.

phases.label: Kickoff
phases.title: Brief to kickoff in 48 hours
phases.description: Once you sign off on the proposal, we move fast. Your dedicated team is briefed and your project is live within two business days.

steps.title: Team assignment
steps.body: Your project is assigned to a specialist team - not a generalist VA. The right people for the specific service, every time.

steps.title: Onboarding to your tools
steps.body: We join your Slack, your Notion, your Linear - whatever you already use. No new tools forced on your workflow unless you want them.

steps.title: Kickoff call and milestone map
steps.body: A 30-minute kickoff call to walk through the scope, confirm deliverables, and align on the milestone map. Then we get to work.

phases.label: Delivery
phases.title: Execution with full visibility
phases.description: You stay in control without doing the work. Daily updates, weekly demos, and a single point of contact throughout the project.

steps.title: Daily async updates
steps.body: Every business day, a short Slack update lands in your channel: what was done, what's next, and any blockers. No chasing required.

steps.title: Weekly progress demo
steps.body: Every Friday, a 20-minute video call to walk through that week's output, gather your feedback, and confirm next week's priorities.

steps.title: Structured revision rounds
steps.body: Feedback is collected in one round per milestone - not an open-ended back-and-forth. Unlimited revisions within scope, processed within 48 hours.

phases.label: Handoff
phases.title: Clean delivery, ready to present
phases.description: Every project is handed off in a format that makes you look good - under your brand, with documentation your clients can actually use.

steps.title: White-label packaging
steps.body: Files, reports, and deliverables are branded with your logo and agency name. Your client sees your work, not ours.

steps.title: Handoff documentation
steps.body: A plain-English handoff doc covers everything your client needs to know - structured so you can send it directly without editing.

steps.title: 14-day post-launch window
steps.body: Minor fixes and small adjustments in the two weeks after delivery are included at no extra cost. We don't disappear at handoff.

communication.headline: You're always in the loop.
communication.sub: Retainer partners get a structured communication rhythm that keeps you informed without pulling you into the weeds. You know what's happening without having to ask.

channels.name: Slack
channels.description: Direct access to your team. Messages answered same-day during business hours. No ticketing systems, no waiting rooms.

channels.name: Weekly Demos
channels.description: A 20-minute video call every Friday to review output, give feedback, and align on the following week's priorities.

channels.name: Project Board
channels.description: Live task tracking in your preferred tool - Notion, Linear, Asana, or ClickUp. Every task has a status, owner, and due date.

channels.name: Monthly Reports
channels.description: A performance summary delivered on the first of each month: what was built, metrics moved, and the priorities for the month ahead.

cadence.action: Async Slack update - done, doing, blocked
20-min Friday demo + next week priorities confirmed
Strategic review - results, roadmap, and growth opportunities

whiteLabel.headline: We stay invisible. You take the credit.
whiteLabel.sub: Your client never knows we exist. Every touchpoint - files, reports, communications, and deliverables - goes through you, under your brand.

promises.title: We never contact your clients directly
promises.description: All client-facing communication is yours to own. We supply the updates, you pass them on. Your client relationship stays exactly that - yours.

promises.title: Everything leaves under your brand
promises.description: Proposals, reports, files, and handoff docs carry your logo and agency name. Nothing leaves our side with growX branding unless you specifically ask for it.

promises.title: Your pricing is your business
promises.description: Our rates are your cost. What you charge your client is entirely your decision. Most partners mark up 30–100%. We never know, and it's not our place to.

promises.title: We join your tools, not the other way around
promises.description: We operate inside your Slack workspace, your project board, your email aliases if needed. To your client, it looks like a seamless extension of your team.

promises.title: NDAs available on request
promises.description: If your agency or your client requires a non-disclosure agreement, we sign. Standard mutual NDA, returned within 24 hours, no legal wrangling.

promises.title: We escalate to you, never around you
promises.description: If a project issue requires a client decision, we flag it to you with a recommended path forward. You make the call. We execute it.

faq.question: How quickly can you start after I sign the proposal?
faq.answer: Your project kicks off within 48 hours of proposal sign-off. The team is briefed, tools are set up, and a kickoff call is scheduled - all within two business days.

faq.question: What if I need to pause or cancel a retainer?
faq.answer: Retainers run month-to-month. Give us 14 days' notice and we'll wrap active work cleanly, hand off everything in progress, and close out with a final report. No lock-in clauses.

faq.question: Can I add more work mid-month?
faq.answer: Yes. If you have a one-off project outside your retainer scope, we quote it separately and run it in parallel. Your dedicated team handles both without dropping the ball on either.

faq.question: Who is my single point of contact?
faq.answer: A dedicated delivery manager is assigned at kickoff. They coordinate the specialist team on your behalf, field your Slack messages, and run your weekly demos. One person, full accountability.

faq.question: How are revisions handled?
faq.answer: Each milestone includes one structured revision round. Feedback is collected in a single session - not drip-fed over days. Revisions are processed within 48 hours. Unlimited revisions within the agreed scope.

faq.question: What happens if a deadline is missed?
faq.answer: We flag it before it happens - not after. If a milestone is at risk, you'll know 48 hours in advance with a revised timeline and clear reason. We don't hide delays.
